creator: yani@pi-greece.eu
text:
Same problem here, pkg complaints about the website certificate when downloading the META packages. pkg 1.19.2 didn't complain about the issue. Needless to say that the certificate and CA chain setup on the repository is fine.

pkg -d update -f

DBG(1)[44324]> pkg initialized
Updating FreeBSD-base repository catalogue...
DBG(1)[44324]> PkgRepo: verifying update for FreeBSD-base

DBG(1)[44324]> Request to fetch https://pkg.panoramic-imaging.com:8443/DNSSERVER12/FreeBSD:12:amd64/latest/meta.conf
DBG(1)[44324]> curl_open
DBG(1)[44324]> Fetch: fetcher used: https

DBG(1)[44324]> CURL> No mirror set url to https://pkg.panoramic-imaging.com:8443/DNSSERVER12/FreeBSD:12:amd64/latest/meta.conf

DBG(1)[44324]> CURL> attempting to fetch from https://pkg.panoramic-imaging.com:8443/DNSSERVER12/FreeBSD:12:amd64/latest/meta.conf, left retry 3
